expectations.text: Output identifies the travel mode as self-driving/自驾/有车.
Output increases attention to parking, road access, main-road access, or parking-lot proximity.
expectations.evidence: PASS: checked for parking/road access emphasis

expectations.text: Output avoids ranking only by closest distance to the scenic entrance.
expectations.evidence: PASS: checked not only closest-distance ranking

expectations.text: Output includes recommendations and cautions tailored to self-driving.

timing.note: Subagent notifications in this environment did not include total_tokens or duration_ms, so timing/tokens are unavailable.

workarounds: Automated text-based grading; human review recommended for factual hotel accuracy.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are text-coverage checks for workflow behavior, not factual verification of hotel inventory or live pricing.
